name: open-code-review
description: Use Lab-Overflow Open Code Review from local Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run structured code reviews from local Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex skill that invokes the local Open Code Review CLI to review Git workspace changes, commits, and branch comparisons.
defaultPrompt: Use Open Code Review to review my current changes.
Use Open Code Review to review this branch against main.
Use Open Code Review to review and fix high-confidence issues.
